title: Fixed Glow Squids
description: I fixed the glow squids by removing the glow squids.
body:
## Overview  
Put very simply: This mod fixes glow squids by removing them.  

It also replaces every use of the glow ink sacs with glowstone, which means you can right-click signs with glowstone to make them glow and craft item frames with glowstones to create glow item frames.  
  

[Features](https://youtu.be/ErSCu8fbxX4)


 

**Source:** https://github.com/RacoonDog/Fixed-Glow-Squids

**Issues:** https://github.com/RacoonDog/Fixed-Glow-Squids/issues

 

**Note:** This mod overrides the *axolotl_hunts_targets* datapack tag, so it might have incompatibilities.
